name: Peoples
description_short: People's Community Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union based in Vancouver, WA, offering checking, savings, certificates of deposit, auto loans, home loans, and rewards credit cards.
description_long:
People's Community Federal Credit Union (PCCU) is a federally chartered credit union serving the Vancouver, Washington area and surrounding communities. As a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative, it operates under the premise that 'every member gets the same low rate,' emphasizing equitable access to financial services regardless of member status or tenure.

PCCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including Loyalty Checking and Loyalty Savings accounts with competitive interest rates (up to 5.00% APY on checking and 6.00% APY on savings), Certificate of Deposit products (including a 9-month special at 3.00% APY), auto loans with rates as low as 2.99% APR, home loans, and a VISA Platinum Rewards credit card with no annual fees and a 1.90% introductory APR. The credit union also provides online banking enrollment, mobile app access, and a network of branches and ATMs. Additionally, they offer ATM surcharge refunds up to $100 per month for qualifying members.

What distinguishes PCCU is its emphasis on member loyalty through tiered account offerings that reward consistent banking relationships and direct deposit activity. The credit union actively competes for auto loan business by offering rate-matching guarantees and cash bonuses up to $300 for members refinancing loans from other lenders. Their products are specifically designed for individual consumers and families rather than business accounts, maintaining a community-focused approach.

However, prospective members should note that the advertised high interest rates require meeting specific monthly requirements and are limited to initial balance thresholds ($35,000 for checking, $750 for savings), meaning the full advertised rates apply only to portions of deposits. PCCU's primary service area appears concentrated in the Pacific Northwest, which may limit accessibility for non-local members. The credit union does maintain active fraud prevention messaging, indicating awareness of scam concerns affecting the industry.
services: Loyalty Checking accounts with up to 5.00% APY
Loyalty Savings accounts with up to 6.00% APY
Certificates of Deposit (9-month special at 3.00% APY)
Auto loans with rates as low as 2.99% APR
Auto loan rate-matching and refinancing incentives
pros: High-yield Loyalty Checking up to 5.00% APY on first $35,000 with ATM surcharge refunds up to $100/month
High-yield Loyalty Savings up to 6.00% APY on first $750 with tiered rate structure
VISA Rewards card with no annual fees, no balance transfer fees, and 1.90% introductory APR
Auto loan rate-matching guarantee plus cash bonus up to $300 for refinancing from other lenders
Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 2.99% APR
9-month Certificate of Deposit special at 3.00% APY with only $500 minimum opening balance
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure emphasizing equitable rates across all members
cons: High advertised APY rates require meeting unstated monthly requirements and only apply to limited balance thresholds, reducing actual earning potential for larger deposits
Loyalty Checking and Savings accounts limited to one per member, restricting strategy for maximizing high-yield deposits
Service area appears concentrated in Pacific Northwest (Vancouver, WA), potentially limiting accessibility for remote members
Limited visibility into loan product terms, rates for home loans, and other offerings beyond headline promotions
Rate-matching guarantee for auto loans explicitly excludes refinancing of existing PCCU loans
best_for: Pacific Northwest residents seeking member-owned credit union banking with competitive rates on deposits
Auto loan borrowers looking to refinance from other lenders with rate-matching and cash incentives
Savers with modest initial deposits seeking high-yield savings accounts with straightforward terms
Consumers prioritizing no-fee rewards credit cards with introductory rate offers
diagnosis: People's Community Federal Credit Union is best for Pacific Northwest members seeking community-focused, member-owned banking with competitive deposit rates and auto loan products. The primary caveat is that advertised high-yield rates apply only to limited initial balance thresholds and require undisclosed monthly requirements, so actual returns depend heavily on account activity and balance management.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
